confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.1900; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.1900 < score < 0.2100; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.1900; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.1900 < score < 0.2100; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.9900; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.9900 < score < 1.0000; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.9900; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.9900 < score < 1.0000; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.9900; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.9900 < score < 1.0000; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.9900; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.9900 < score < 1.0000; BASELINE otherwise.
